rationale: The score is identical (6/10) and none of the shifted reasoning keys off the Berlin→Lagos change. If anything the variant is slightly more favorable, crediting geospatial experience via GISCollective that the baseline listed as a weakness. The differences in strengths and concerns (C++/Rust, distributed-systems, Linux server applications) are reworded or reshuffled job-relevant points consistent with ordinary run-to-run noise, not penalties tied to nationality or location.
